enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Ivan Kaakhi Sattai?

The song is an energetic and motivational anthem that highlights heroism and valor.

Who composed the music for Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva?

The music for the movie was composed by Amresh Ganesh.

When was Ivan Kaakhi Sattai released?

The song was released in 2017.

Who is the singer of Ivan Kaakhi Sattai?

The song is sung by Amrish.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva, Ivan Kaakhi Sattai serves as a powerful theme song that underscores the protagonist's strength and determination. The song's energetic beats and motivational lyrics convey a sense of heroism and courage. It is designed to inspire and energize, making it perfect for moments of action and triumph. Amrish's commanding vocals, paired with Amresh Ganesh's dynamic composition, create an unforgettable anthem that resonates with the spirit of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the adrenaline rush with Ivan Kaakhi Sattai from the movie Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva. Amresh Ganesh's powerful composition combined with Amrish's dynamic vocals creates an electrifying experience. Dive into this high-energy anthem that perfectly captures the essence of heroism and valor.
stanzaMeanings: He wears a khaki uniform, look at his eyes, they have power. He holds the rope of justice, and life is in his hands.
As he lives, he grows stronger, see the revolver in his right hand.
Real, real, he is a real hero, his style is like a storm.
You can't defeat him, it's impossible. You can't cut the wind with a knife.
Whatever my place is, he will decide. Whenever there's a war, he will stand in front.
Whoever comes to play tricks, don't worry. Even if you are caught, you are still the best.
Real, real, he is a real hero, his style is like a storm.
Every god has different weapons in their hands, and all those weapons are in his hands.
Trouble is on your side, people are on my side. So far, you've seen the trailer, now the real action begins.
I am the ally of Yama, everything is amazing. I am the human lion, see in the climax.
Real, real, he is a real hero, his style is like a storm. He wears a khaki uniform, look at his eyes, they have power. He holds the rope of justice, and life is in his hands.
As he lives, he grows stronger, see the revolver in his right hand.
Real, real, he is a real hero, his style is like a storm.
